---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what's going wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04)
- App version: (e.g. v0.2.0 — visible in the window title or Help menu)
- Installed via: GitHub Releases / Gumroad installer / built from source

## Log files (optional but helpful)

On Windows, app logs are at:
`%LOCALAPPDATA%\claude-code-dashboard\logs\`

Paste relevant lines here if available.

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — screenshots, number of projects/sessions, etc.
